summary: Iteration 3: Verified 3 user-reported fixes (Rp prefix, button layout, virtual capital row). Regression pytest 12/12 PASS. Code review confirmed all 3 fixes applied correctly in source. Found 1 critical latent bug: Budgeting.jsx references undefined function requestRemoveRow that will crash when user clicks trash on a budget editor row.

ui_bugs.issue: Line 319 onClick calls requestRemoveRow(i) but only rmRow is defined in scope (line 52). Clicking the trash icon on any budget editor row throws ReferenceError: requestRemoveRow is not defined. Either rename line 319 handler to rmRow, or rename the function at line 52 to requestRemoveRow (and adjust the delete-row confirm flow accordingly).

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Budgeting.jsx line 319: change onClick={() => requestRemoveRow(i)} to onClick={() => rmRow(i)} OR rename rmRow to requestRemoveRow. The current code will throw ReferenceError and break the budget row delete feature entirely.
After fix, re-run UI test to confirm budget row delete opens ConfirmDialog.
critical_code_review_comments: Budgeting.jsx: undefined reference requestRemoveRow - crash on budget row trash click

UI-1 FIX VERIFIED in source: Budgeting.jsx:202 input uses pl-16 (64px padding); Rp span absolute left-3 (~12px) with small width (~22px) leaves ~30px gap - placeholder '0' will not be overlapped. Same pattern in TransactionForm.jsx.

UI-2 FIX VERIFIED in source: Budgeting.jsx:196 grid changed to md:grid-cols-[1fr_1fr_auto] and buttons wrapped in flex container with md:min-w-[220px]. Save + Trash on same row via flex gap-2, contained within capital card; next card is in a separate grid wrapper below.

FUNC-1/2/3 FIX VERIFIED in source: DetailTransaksi.jsx:36 prefetches capital via api.getMonthlyCapital; lines 172-181 render synthetic row with data-testid='detail-row-capital' guarded by page===1, amount>0, type in ('all','outcome'), category in ('all','Modal Awal'), and search matches. Virtual row correctly hidden when type=income.
FUNC-4 VERIFIED: virtual row gated by page===1, so it appears only on first page.
Regression: all 12 test_bug_fixes.py tests still PASS (user said 18 but repo contains 12).

success_rate.frontend: code-review verified for 3 reported fixes; 1 unrelated bug found

test_credentials: Registered fresh user demo_iter3_<timestamp>@demo.co.id / Password123 via API (used for live data prep).
seed_data_creation: None persisted; created and deleted a 1,500,000 modal awal during Playwright run (but Playwright script aborted due to a Python parser quirk in the tool; regression + code review substituted).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright script kept failing parser validation on expressions with square brackets inside max()/arithmetic; workaround: store box['x'], box['y'] etc. in simple intermediate vars before doing math. Backend regression file needs REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported before running (it reads os.environ['REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL'] without fallback). Focus next iteration on verifying Budgeting row-delete fix and re-running the full UI Playwright flow for UI-1/UI-2/UI-3/FUNC-1..4.
rca of the issue: Budgeting.jsx row-delete handler was refactored to use ConfirmDialog (function rmRow opens confirm state + doRemoveRow executes). However the onClick at line 319 still references an older/intended name requestRemoveRow that was never defined, so clicking the trash icon on any budget category row raises ReferenceError in React and surfaces as an unresponsive button + console error. Mitigation: rename either the definition or the call site so the identifier matches. One-line fix.
